episodes.title: Getting Smarter #10 - Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn | Cults, Control & the Occult
episodes.description:
Why do so many cults, religions, and secret societies start with good intentions—and end in control, fear, or tragedy?

In this episode, we dive deep into the psychology behind cult behavior, belief systems, and ritual—exploring everything from Jonestown and Satanic Panic to Aleister Crowley, the Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn, and the unsettling overlap between religion and the occult.

We talk about:

How cult leaders gain power and influence

Why intelligent, good people get pulled in

The psychology of control, shame, and obedience

Religion vs. ritual—and who decides the difference

Satanic Panic and manipulation through fear

A real Ouija board experience that still raises questions

This conversation moves from history to psychology to personal paranormal experiences, asking one big question:
Is belief dangerous—or is control the real threat?
